Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: As a user, I want the system to respond within [SPECIFY TIME] so that I can complete my tasks efficiently
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: Added 'so that' clause to express business value, replaced vague term 'fast' with measurable condition 'within [SPECIFY TIME]', added acceptance criteria with action verbs and measurable conditions, and kept the core business intent

Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: As a developer, I want to implement user authentication so that users can log in and access the system securely.
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: The original story prescribed implementation details and lacked acceptance criteria. The improved story removes technology choices and adds concrete, verifiable acceptance criteria with measurable conditions to satisfy the INVEST framework.

Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: En tant qu'utilisateur, je veux une fonctionnalité de connexion, afin de pouvoir accéder aux fonctionnalités de l'application de manière sécurisée
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: J'ai ajouté le format "As a [role], I want [feature], so that [benefit]" pour rendre l'histoire utilisateur plus claire et concise. Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: As a registered user, I want to log in to my account so that I can access my personal dashboard.
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: Added two concrete acceptance criteria with action verbs and measurable conditions to improve testability, while keeping the core business intent and removing any implementation technology prescriptions.

Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: As a customer, I want to view my order history so that I can track my past purchases
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: Added more acceptance criteria to improve testability, used action verbs, and made conditions measurable. Removed implementation technology prescriptions and external dependencies. Improved story to be independent, negotiable, valuable, estimable, small, and testable.

Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: As a project manager, I want to assign tasks to team members so that I can distribute work effectively and complete tasks within [SPECIFY TIME] so that the team can meet project deadlines.
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: The original story had vague terms, few acceptance criteria, and depended on another story. The improved story replaces vague terms with measurable conditions, adds more acceptance criteria, and removes the dependency on another story. The acceptance criteria now include action verbs and measurable conditions, and the story is self-contained.

Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: En tant qu'utilisateur, je veux pouvoir réinitialiser mon mot de passe afin d'accéder à mon compte si je l'oublie, so that I can quickly recover my account access
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: Added two concrete acceptance criteria with measurable conditions, removed any implementation technology prescriptions, and kept the core business intent. The story now satisfies the INVEST framework.

Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: En tant que responsable RH, je veux consulter les candidatures reçues afin de sélectionner les meilleurs profils pour un entretien, so that je peux identifier les candidats les plus qualifiés.
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: The original story has been improved to include a clear 'so that' clause expressing business value, and the acceptance criteria have been rewritten to include action verbs and measurable conditions. The story is now independent, negotiable, valuable, estimable, small, and testable, with a target testability score of at least 0.7.

Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: As a registered user, I want to reset my password so that I can regain access to my account when I forget my credentials
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: The original story was improved by removing implementation technology prescriptions, adding action verbs to the acceptance criteria, and replacing vague terms with measurable conditions. The core business intent was kept, and all existing acceptance criteria were rewritten to start with an action verb and include measurable conditions. Placeholder values were used where specific values were not stated in the original story.

Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: En tant qu'utilisateur enregistré, je veux me connecter via email et mot de passe afin d'accéder à mon espace personnel et retrouver mes données, ainsi que bénéficier d'une expérience utilisateur sécurisée et fiable, so that j'ai confiance dans la protection de mes informations personnelles.
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: L'histoire originale a été améliorée pour inclure une clause de valeur métier, ainsi que des critères d'acceptation plus spécifiques et mesurables. Les verbes d'action tels que 'affiche', 'bloque', 'redirige' et 'crée' ont été utilisés pour améliorer la testabilité. Les termes vagues tels que 'rapidement' ont été remplacés par des conditions mesurables. Les prescriptions technologiques et les références à d'autres histoires ont été supprimées.
